response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience across web, mobile, and some embedded-adjacent work, but lacks the core requirements for this role: no native-level Japanese proficiency indicated (only English, Romanian, basic German), no demonstrated C/UNIX systems development as a primary skill in recent roles, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no background in network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal) or LAN-switch/embedded networking firmware.
strengths: Broad multi-language software engineering background spanning 15+ years
Some low-level C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and embedded-adjacent work
Strong testing/TDD discipline and DevOps/CI familiarity
concerns: No Linux kernel source-code modification or embedded firmware experience
No demonstrated background in network security (MACsec, 802.1X) or LAN-switch products

key_factors.factor: No Linux kernel / embedded networking security experience
General software engineering breadth and C exposure
